specializationList.name: Outburst
specializationList.tip:
When your Energy is above 90%, the Damage on your attacks is increased by 5/10/15% base damage.
The Healing portions of your powers are increased by 5/10/15%.
Your power costs are increased by 5/10/15%.

specializationList.name: Power Overwhelming
specializationList.tip: Your Secondary Super Stats now grant Offense.

specializationList.name: Hardened
specializationList.tip: Your Endurance now provides an additional +2/4 Maximum Health Points.

specializationList.name: Endurance Mastery
specializationList.tip:
You gain 3% of your Maximum Energy when certain criteria are met, dependent on your Role:
Tank Role: Whenever you take damage. This effect can only occur once every 3 seconds.
Melee Damage or Ranged Roles: Whenever you deal damage. This effect can only occur once every 3 seconds.
Support Role: Whenever you Heal a target. This effect can only occur once every 3 seconds.
Hybrid Role: Every 5 seconds you are in combat.

specializationList.name: Fortified Gear
specializationList.tip: Increases the amount of Defense you receive from items by 10/20/30%.

specializationList.name: Beacon of Hope
specializationList.tip: Increase healing received from others by 3/6/9%.

specializationList.tip: Snare will no longer reduce your movement speed, and your Run Speed is increased by 10/20%.

specializationList.name: Bulwark
specializationList.tip:
Increases your Maximum Health by 5/10% when not in the Hybrid Role.
When in the Hybrid Role, this Specialization instead causes your Super Stats to increase your Threat Generation.

specializationList.name: Debilitating Challenge
specializationList.tip: Your Challenge! now reduces the damage resistance of your primary target by 2/4% for 12 sec.

specializationList.tip: Whenever you are Knocked or Held, you regain 2/4/6% of your Maximum Health over the next 5 seconds.

specializationList.name: Protector Mastery
specializationList.tip: Whenever a damaging attack brings you below 30% Health, the Recharge Time on your Active Defense powers is reset. This effect can only occur once every 60 seconds.

specializationList.name: The Glory of Battle
specializationList.tip: Your AoE attacks grant a stack of Glory for each target they hit. When you reach 30 stacks of Glory, the stack is consumed and becomes Glorious Battle, which grants you 16/33/49 Offense and Critical Strike Rating. Glorious Battle lasts for 15 seconds, and prevents you from gaining additional stacks of Glory for the duration.

specializationList.name: No Escape
specializationList.tip: Your Energy Builder has a 33/67/100% chance to Daze your target for 4s if they are within 10 feet of you. Dazed characters move 20% slower.

specializationList.name: Penetrating Strikes
specializationList.tip: When getting a Critical Hit with a direct melee attack, applies Penetrating Strikes for 5 sec, causing attacks to ignore 5/10% of the target's Resistances.

specializationList.name: Ruthless
specializationList.tip: Increases your Critical Severity by 5/10%.

specializationList.tip: Your Single Target attacks now do an additional 3.3/6.7/10% base damage to targets under 35% health.

specializationList.tip: Your Melee Combo attacks have an increasing chance to cause your next non-Combo Melee attack to deal an additional 10/20% base damage.

specializationList.name: Flanking
specializationList.tip: Increases the Melee Damage you deal from behind your target by 3.3/6.7/10%.

specializationList.name: Offensive Expertise
specializationList.tip: Your Active Offense powers benefit from an additional 7/14% Power Recharge Reduction.

specializationList.name: Ruthless
specializationList.tip: Increases your Critical Severity by 5/10%.

specializationList.tip: When your Energy Builder deals damage it has a 33/67/100% chance to Daze your target for 4s if they are more than 10 feet away from you. Dazed characters move 20% slower.

specializationList.name: Anguish
specializationList.tip: Whenever you Critically Strike with a Ranged attack, you deal additional Penetrating Damage every 2 sec for 6 sec. (Penetrating Damage is only resisted by Resistance to All damage, and ignores half of that resistance. Penetrating Damage also ignores half of the absorption provided by Shields.)

specializationList.name: Round 'Em Up
specializationList.tip: Your AoE attacks cause your targets to take 1/2/3% more damage from further AoE attacks you make. Stacks up to 3 times and lasts 10s.

specializationList.tip: Striking a target above 90% Health with a single target attack now grants you an additional 5/10% Critical Chance for 4 sec.

specializationList.name: Relentless Assault
specializationList.tip: Your Maintained attacks increase your Offense by 10/20/30 for 8 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

specializationList.name: Offensive Expertise
specializationList.tip: Your Active Offense powers benefit from an additional 7/14% Power Recharge Reduction.

specializationList.name: Avenger Mastery
specializationList.tip: Whenever you get 2 Critical attacks within 5 sec, your next Blast power has its Charge time reduced by 50%.

specializationList.name: Torment
specializationList.tip: Increases the duration of your Hold powers by 10/20%.

specializationList.tip: Whenever you take damage, you gain 5/10 Offense. This effect lasts 15s, stacks up to 5 times, and can only occur once per second.

specializationList.tip: You gain 33/67/100% of your Defense from gear as Offense.

specializationList.tip: Whenever a damaging attack brings you below 50% Health, the attacker is Stunned and you heal nearby allies for 10% of your Maximum Health.
